Notes: Pass a prerequisite on an existing helper RRset, then request deletion of a specific RR that is not present in the target RRset. The follow-up query checks whether the server silently no-ops or reflects an error/abort behavior.

Steps.Description: Prerequisite passes on host1.campus.edu. A, then delete an absent A RR at host2.campus.edu.

Steps.Name: host2.campus.edu.
Steps.Description: Observe whether host2 was created, left absent, or otherwise affected by the UPDATE.

Steps.Name: host1.campus.edu.
Steps.Description: Confirm the prerequisite helper RRset remains present.
